_comment: Tests .fpi prefix collision: words sharing long common prefixes require the front-coding/ambiguous-bound logic in binarySearchFpi. Device must generate .idx.fpi, then find each word despite the shared prefix.

entries.definition: First word in collision pair: shares 16-char prefix with internationalize.
Second word in collision pair: shares 16-char prefix with internationalism.
Third word in collision group: also shares the 16-char prefix.
Another collision: shares prefix with microelectronic.
Collision: shares 16-char prefix 'microelectromech' with next entry.
Collision: shares 16-char prefix 'microelectromech' with previous entry.
A short word with no collision risk.
